allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; pkg=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**pkg.get\('dependencies',{}\), **pkg.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,':',v\) for k in ['expo-blur','react-native-reanimated','expo-linear-gradient','react-native-safe-area-context','react-native-reanimated-carousel','expo-image','expo-router','i18n-js','react-i18next'] if k in deps]")
Bash(node -e "try { console.log\('nativewind:', require\('nativewind/package.json'\).version\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('nativewind not installed'\) }")
Bash(node -e "try { console.log\('css-interop:', require\('react-native-css-interop/package.json'\).version\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('css-interop not installed'\) }")
